author: qi3w
content: Plan: Convert root to Cargo workspace with members crates/crossbridge (existing CLI) and crates/crossbridge-protocol (new library). Protocol crate defines all message types per kickoff: Register/RegisterResponse/Notification/SupervisorMessage (supervisor<->server), ClientRequest/SubmitIssue/SubmitAnswer/AnswerComment/Attachment/ServerResponse (agent<->server). postcard serde. Length-prefixed framing with u32 LE prefix and 16 MiB cap. Sync helpers using std::io::Read/Write; async helpers using tokio::io::{AsyncReadExt,AsyncWriteExt}, gated behind 'tokio' feature. No crosslink dep. Update default.nix cargoBuildFlags for workspace package selection.
